Body.Content:
You can now create a rule that automatically replies to incoming messages with a template you've set up. Set the conditions you care about and pick the template, and Outlook handles the response for you. It's a simple way to send consistent replies without typing the same thing over and over. #newoutlookforwindows

GA date: September CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Reply with a Template in Rules
